page_content:
Prerequisite: ENME331.

Restriction: Permission of ENGR-Mechanical Engineering department. Jointly offered with ENME656. Credit only gran ted for. ENME483 or ENME656.

2025-2026 [updated 2025.04.17]

ENME484 Analysis of Turbulent Flow (3 Credits)

Relentless growth in the speed and size of supercomputers has encouraged the ever expanding use of numerical simulation in the practice of fluids engineering. For the flow past ground vehicles, in

the urban grid, re-entering rockets, helicopters landing on ships at sea and countless other examples, the flow is turbulent, and simulation is becoming or will one day become the methodology of choice in analyzing and designing such technologies. The goal of this course is to give
